amendment.description: An amendment numbered 4 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to revise requirements for the Dairy Business Innovation Initiatives program to ensure equitable distribution of funding between the four regionally located Initiatives.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Carbajal amendment (A005) Agreed to by voice vote.

action.text: House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Carbajal amendment (A005) Agreed to by voice vote.
